name: shopify-theme-starter
description: A minimal Shopify theme with Tailwind CSS
author: Codersy <hello@codersy.com> (https://www.codersy.com)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run watch:css" "shopify theme dev --environment development"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:css && shopify theme push --environment production
scripts.lint: npm run format:check && npm run theme:check
